chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.S-250 of 2023 (Nazir Ahmed Lanjwani Vs. P.O Sindh and others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For non-prosecution. 05-1-2-2023. The petitioner present in person. ******** The office objection has not been complied with perhaps knowingly. The petitioner by way of instant petition has sought for direction against the official respondents to submit a report that under what law they are constructing the houses of private respondents. Issue involved is requiring factual controversy; therefore, same could not be resolved by this Court under the garb of harassment/protection. Consequently the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine. J U D G E Nasim/P.A
